defuse_position.description: nil/absent when nobody defused; never a {0,0,0} sentinel

defuse_started_ms.description: the successful defuse's start, since round start, ms

has_kit.description: successful defuse used a kit (same token as DefuseAttempt.has_kit)

Bomb.description: Bomb is the plant/defuse/explode outcome for a round.

opponents.description: the N in 1vN, measured when the clutch began

saved.description: round lost but the clutcher lived

start_ms.description: when the clutch began, since round start, ms

opponent_ids.description: enemies alive when the clutch began, sorted ascending

Clutch.description: Clutch is a 1vN where the player is last alive on their side.

saved.description: lost the round but the clutcher lived

ClutchStats.description: ClutchStats sums up a player's clutch outcomes.

shots.description: rifle shots measured, enemy in vision, not crouched

stopped.description: of those, fired under the accuracy speed cap

avg_speed.description: avg horizontal speed when firing, u/s

CounterStrafe.description: CounterStrafe measures how stopped a player was when firing.

t_ms.description: since round start, ms; a c4 detonation hit lands past round_end_ms (shockwave travel)

attacker.description: absent for the c4 detonation (no player attacker)

health_damage.description: capped at the victim's remaining HP

damage_type.description: bullet / he / fire / knife / taser / bomb / world / other

attacker_position.description: set only when the positions stream is on, to keep core-tier output lean.

DefuseAttempt.description: DefuseAttempt is one started defuse, completed or aborted.

items.description: columnar ground-item position sample, fields in order: t_ms, x, y, z, hold_frames

is_initial.description: spawn/round-start state (dropped_at_ms == 0), not a real mid-round drop

picked_up_at_ms.description: absent = still on ground at round end

on_death.description: last owner was dead when it dropped

DroppedItem.description: DroppedItem is one item-on-the-ground stint: it lies on the ground from dropped_at_ms until picked_up_at_ms (absent = still down at round end).

damage.description: health damage killer dealt to victim

time_to_damage_ms.description: median ms seeing to first damage, needs a map mesh

Duel.description: Duel is one killer's record against one victim over the whole match.

blind_ms.description: total blind time on this victim, ms

FlashPair.description: FlashPair holds how often and how long a flasher blinded one victim.

flash_duration_ms.description:
raw networked flash effect duration, ms: the clock the client whiteout fade
runs on (blind_ms is this scaled by the blind-time calibration). the fade
starts at the grenade's detonate_ms; curve in docs/output.md.

FlashedPlayer.description: FlashedPlayer is one player blinded by a flashbang, with how long.

voxels.description:
smokes only, and only when the grenade_paths stream is on: the cloud's
networked voxel occupancy over its lifetime. Absent when the demo does not
carry the voxel stream (older CS2 demos): render the fallback circle.

GrenadeBasic.description: GrenadeBasic is one thrown smoke or decoy.

GrenadeHE.description: GrenadeHE is one thrown HE grenade.

damage_dealt.description: total HP fire damage to ENEMIES

team_damage.description: total HP fire damage to TEAMMATES

fire_cells.description: peak per-flame fire footprint, sorted by x then y then z

GrenadeMolotov.description: GrenadeMolotov is one thrown molotov or incendiary.

GrenadePath.description: GrenadePath is one grenade's flight trajectory plus bounce points.

side.description: victim side CT/T at this round

GrenadeVictim.description: GrenadeVictim is one player damaged by an HE detonation or molotov inferno.

Grenades.description: Grenades holds the typed per-round grenade buckets.

InventoryChange.description: InventoryChange is one snapshot at a phase where inventory actually changed: a change log, not a per-tick dump.

steam_id.description: matches the steam_id string convention used across the model

round.description: 1-based round in progress at the event

LifecycleEvent.description: LifecycleEvent is one connection/bot transition for a playing-team player.

Loadout.description: Loadout is the freeze-time-end inventory snapshot for one round-player, grouped and counted.

LoadoutItem.description: LoadoutItem is one grouped grenade or equipment item in a loadout.

LoadoutWeapon.description: LoadoutWeapon is one grouped gun in a loadout or inventory change.

server_platform.description: best guess: valve / esl / esea / faceit / ... / unknown

game_mode.description: competitive / premier / wingman / ... from the game_type/game_mode convars. When those are absent (Valve matchmaking demos) a fallback reports "competitive" only for a queued-matchmaking 5v5 MR12 game (premier is indistinguishable, same as the convar path) and leaves wingman/casual/non-Valve demos empty; it never overrides a convar-derived value.

workshop_id.description: addon id, empty for official maps

c4_wave_speed.description: planted-c4 shockwave speed, game units/sec; present only on post-rework demos (build_num >= 14168), see finalize.go

attempts.description: opening duels taken part in, kill or death

OpeningStats.description: OpeningStats sums up a player's opening-duel involvement.

positions_fields.description: declared column order of a streams.positions[] tuple (see model.PositionFields)

ground_item_positions_fields.description: declared column order of a ground_items[].positions tuple (see model.GroundItemPositionFields)

map_mesh_loaded.description: were geometric LOS aim stats computable

OutputMeta.description: OutputMeta is the self-describing fidelity descriptor: the tier and the set of populated detail streams.

PlantAttempt.description: PlantAttempt is one started plant, completed or aborted (a fake plant).

color.description: minimap slot color: yellow/purple/green/blue/orange. empty for grey/unknown

clan_tag.description: per-player clan tag, distinct from team_name (the clan name)

exit_kills.description: after the round was decided, kept out of K/D

stats.description:
Derived ratios / ratings / percentages, nested so they can't be confused with
the raw counts above. See PlayerStats.

spotted_shots.description:
Raw counts that feed the derived stats (kept top-level, directly tallied).
The omitempty fields below need a map mesh for line of sight and drop when none is loaded.

time_to_damage_raw.description:
raw per-engagement samples, only emitted with the aim-debug option. used by the
offline calibration sweep; omitted (nil) in normal output.

knife_kills.description: kill-type counters. chicken_kills is player-total only (no chicken victim per round).

picked_up_kills.description: kills made with a picked-up gun

rank.description: Valve comp/premier rank. only set for Valve MM demos, 0 otherwise.

spray_patterns.description: recoil-pattern deviation, one per weapon variant

opening_overall.description: Opening duels (first kill of each round), split by side

clutch_overall.description: Clutches (last alive on their side vs N enemies), split by side

spotted_accuracy_pct.description: mesh-gated (line of sight): dropped when no map mesh is loaded.

spray_accuracy_pct.description: share of spray bullets that hit

time_to_damage_ms.description: median ms, seeing an enemy to first damage

crosshair_placement.description: median deg moved from sighting to hit

PlayerStats.description: PlayerStats is the per-player nested derived block (players[].stats): the ratios, ratings and percentages computed FROM the player's raw counts.

round_start_ms.description: freeze (round) start, ms; negative, relative to go-live at t=0

freeze_end_ms.description: freeze end / round goes live, ms; always 0 (the round timeline origin)

round_end_ms.description: round-live start to round end, ms

post_round_ms.description: round end to next freeze, the exit window, ms

kills.description: live-round kill timeline, enriched with duel semantics

damages.description: live-round damage events, plus the post-round c4 detonation hits

pickups.description: real transfers between players; buys and same-player events are excluded, see WeaponPickup

bomb.description: nil unless the bomb was planted

streams.description: Heavy opt-in detail. set only when at least one stream is on.

killer.description: null when kind != "player" (bomb/world/suicide have no player killer)

killer_side.description: CT/T at this round; absent for non-player kills

killer_position.description: nil for non-player kills (no live killer)

weapon_class.description: pistol / smg / rifle / sniper / heavy / "" for bomb/world

distance.description: killer to victim, game units; absent for non-player kills

killer_speed.description: killer horizontal speed at the kill, u/s, derived; absent for non-player kills

killer_speed_ratio.description: speed / weapon max move speed. lower is better; absent for non-player kills

traded.description: death traded within 4s by a teammate

traded_by.description: the teammate who traded this death

possible_traders.description: teammates alive and in a position to trade

picked_up.description: kill-weapon was picked up: original_owner != killer

killer_scoped.description: killer was scoped at the kill

knife_kills.description: per-round kill-type counters. NO chicken_kills here (chickens are player-total only).

picked_up_kills.description: kills made with a picked-up gun

start_money.description:
Economy. EquipmentValue is captured at buy-window close, capped at death (was
freeze-time-end). Loadout stays the freeze-time-end item snapshot.

equipment_value.description: value at buy-window close, capped at death (was freeze-time-end)

is_connected.description: per-round connection state, captured at freeze-end.

is_controlling_bot.description: human driving a bot this round

opening_death_traded.description: lost the opener and got traded

clutch.description: set only if this player clutched

RoundPlayer.description: RoundPlayer is one player's contribution in a single round.

items.description: columnar position sample, fields in order: t_ms, side, x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, yaw, pitch, health, armor, money, flags, active_weapon, place, stamina, duck_amount, hold_frames (flags bits: alive=1, airborne=2, scoped=4, ducking=8, has_defuse_kit=16, buyzone=32, walking=64, bomb_zone=128)

RoundStreams.description: RoundStreams is the opt-in heavy detail for a round.

team_a_name.description: Clan/team names if the demo carries them. empty in matchmaking/pugs.

recoil_index.description:
RecoilIndex is the engine recoil index: the shot number into the current
spray. Map it against the shipped players[].spray_patterns table rather than
reimplementing recoil math. NOTE: spray_patterns are base/pattern-space bytes
from the weaponX/weaponY recoil table; they are NOT real GOTV recoil (real
recoil from CMsgTEFireBullets is ~2x and lives in a different space).

Shot.description: Shot is one weapon-fire event plus the shooter's geometry.

ShotStat.description: ShotStat is the core-tier per-player-per-weapon shot aggregate, so stat consumers lose nothing when the per-shot stream is off.

occupied.description: first sample only: the full occupied set, as runs

add.description: later samples: voxels turned occupied since the previous sample, as runs

del.description: later samples: voxels cleared since the previous sample, as runs

SmokeVoxelSample.description: SmokeVoxelSample is one step of the cloud's occupancy track: every list is run-length encoded over the sorted linear voxel indices (x + y*32 + z*1024) as flat [start, len, start, len, ...] pairs, one run covering the len consecutive indices start..start+len-1.

samples.description: occupancy over the cloud's lifetime; hold each shape until the next sample

SmokeVoxels.description: SmokeVoxels is a smoke cloud's volumetric occupancy on the 32x32x32 voxel grid the server networks per smoke: origin is the grid's world min corner (detonation position minus 192 per axis) and voxel (x,y,z) spans [origin + v*cell, origin + (v+1)*cell] per axis.

SprayBullet.description: SprayBullet compares, at a given shot index, the ideal aim offset that cancels the recoil pattern (ideal) against what the player actually did (actual).

scoped.description: fired while scoped in (AUG/SG553 have a scoped pattern)

silencer_on.description: silencer attached (M4A1-S has a no-silencer pattern)

avg_deviation.description: mean deg off from ideal recoil compensation

SprayDeviation.description: SprayDeviation holds how a player's sprays with one weapon matched its recoil pattern, averaged over every 3+ shot spray they fired.

duel_pairs.description: whole-match head-to-head pairs/edge list with per-pair TTD

match_lifecycle.description:
match-level connect/disconnect/bot-takeover log, playing-team players only,
sorted by time at finalize for determinism.

Stats.description: Stats groups the match-level aggregate blocks at the document root.

blind_ms.description: blind time per enemy flashed, ms

UtilityAverages.description: UtilityAverages holds a player's match-level utility averages.

flashes_leading_to_kill.description: enemy killed by thrower's team while fully blind from this flash

enemy_blind_ms.description: total blind time put on enemies, ms

unused_utility_value.description: $ of util still in hand at death, summed over deaths

WeaponPickup.description: WeaponPickup is one item pickup in a round: a gun or grenade transferred from another player (original_owner set and different from the holder).

WeaponSpray.description: WeaponSpray holds a weapon's match spray accuracy: count of 3+ shot sprays fired and the share of those bullets that landed.

WeaponStat.description: WeaponStat is a player's kill/damage breakdown for a single weapon.
